hero.title: AILinkCinema studies each audiovisual client's real needs and applies AI to solve concrete problems.
hero.subtitle: We do not sell generic AI: we identify real bottlenecks in production companies, direction, post-production, sales and distribution, then turn them into modular solutions or CID Studio, the complete system from script to production, sales and distribution materials.
hero.support: Built for production companies, directors, technical teams, studios, distributors and post-production crews.

what.title: What AILinkCinema is and what it does
what.body: AILinkCinema works as a consulting-product layer: it analyzes real audiovisual client needs, identifies operational and creative problems, then deploys applied AI through modular solutions or CID Studio.
what.point1: It starts with diagnosis: processes, materials, roles, deliverables and client blockers.
what.point2: Then it proposes modular solutions born from real problems detected in clients.
what.point3: When full coverage is needed, CID Studio connects script, production, sales and distribution.

problems.title: Problems it solves for production companies, directors, technical teams and distributors
problems.card1Body: AILinkCinema does not force a closed package: it studies the real case and selects the right modular solution.
problems.card2Body: It applies AI where friction exists: reading, breakdowns, transcription, search, commercial preparation and delivery.
problems.card3Body: It connects script, feedback, visual materials, editing and distribution so each decision can be retrieved and reused.
problems.card4Body: Modular solutions can work alone or integrate into CID Studio when the project requires full continuity.

modules.title: Existing modular solutions
modules.subtitle: Initial catalog of solutions born from real problems detected in audiovisual clients.

standalone.title: What can be acquired separately and what each solution is for
standalone.body: Each modular solution can be hired independently when the client needs to solve a specific problem without deploying the complete CID Studio system.

cidSuite.title: What CID Studio includes as a complete system
cidSuite.body: CID Studio is AILinkCinema's complete solution: it connects script, analysis, visual development, breakdown, feedback, editorial intelligence, sales and distribution in one operational workflow.
cidSuite.point1: Centralized governance of assets, processes and outputs.
cidSuite.point2: Modular solution activation depending on client, role and project phase.
cidSuite.point3: From script to production, sales and distribution materials.

useCases.title: Real-world use cases
useCases.case1Body: Accelerate development, budgeting, commercial materials and coordination across departments.
useCases.case2Body: Generate storyboards, visual references, creative selects and decision layers faster.
useCases.case3Body: Search by content, build paper edits and connect outputs with DaVinci Resolve, Avid Media Composer and Adobe Premiere Pro.
useCases.case4Body: Prepare launch packages, audience analysis and dossiers for buyers and partners.

pricing.title: Pricing and plans
pricing.starterBody: License or service focused on a single problem with a constrained deployment.
pricing.starterMeta: Ideal for pilots and initial adoption
pricing.suiteBody: Complete system for organizations that need to cover from script to production, sales and distribution materials.
pricing.enterpriseBody: Controlled deployment, onboarding, support and configuration aligned with security, teams and workload.
pricing.enterpriseMeta: Designed for studios and complex organizations

demo.title: Demo / contact / onboarding
demo.body: The commercial strategy starts with diagnosis, a controlled demo and guided onboarding before activating a modular solution or CID Studio.
demo.point1: Commercial demo aligned with real client scenarios.
demo.point2: Contact path for evaluating standalone solutions or CID Studio.
demo.point3: Phased onboarding by role, team and business goals.

footer.line: AILinkCinema diagnoses real needs and commercializes modular solutions or CID Studio for film and audiovisual operations.

register.selectSubtitle: Choose CID Studio access, a guided demo or partner program depending on your need.
register.demoSubtitle: Consultative session with the team to diagnose real needs and propose a solution.
register.cidSubtitle: Select the CID Studio program that best fits you.

pricing.ruleTitle: Complete product or targeted module depending on the project's moment.
pricing.modulesTitle: Every module has its own price, and all can be integrated inside CID.
pricing.footerText: Pricing for premium film software, real pipeline configuration and specialized solutions.
pricing.footerNote: AILinkCinema distinguishes between modules, the complete CID product and custom development.

solutions.heroTitle: AI solutions for film and audiovisual teams
solutions.heroDescription: AI solution catalog for film focused on pre-production: CID, script breakdown, storyboard, planning, pitch, promo video and VFX.
solutions.baseTitle: CID is the main product, with specialized apps that can operate separately or integrated.
solutions.baseText: You can hire each module separately or integrate all of them inside CID for a complete workflow.
solutions.futureTitle: Labs and future products outside CID Core
solutions.futureText: Dubbing, sound post and restoration remain separate lines for future products and are not part of the visible CID Core catalog.
solutions.footerText: Main product, specialized apps and custom development for real cinematic workflows.
solutions.footerNote: Each module can be hired separately and all of them can be integrated inside CID.

modulesCatalog.seoDescription: Explore the CID Core modular suite and activate AI modules for development, script, storyboard, budgeting, funding, pitch and planning.
modulesCatalog.title: CID Modules
modulesCatalog.subtitle: Activate the visible CID Core modules for script, storyboard, visual bible, budgeting, funding, pitch and basic previs.
modulesCatalog.scopeNote: This commercial layer prioritizes cinematic pre-production scope. Dubbing, sound post and restoration labs remain outside the client-visible catalog.
modulesCatalog.availableHelp: Ready to open or activate per project.
modulesCatalog.expandHelp: Blocks activated by plan or commercial approval.
modulesCatalog.catalogErrorTitle: We could not load the modular catalog
modulesCatalog.catalogErrorFallback: Check the backend connection and try again.
modulesCatalog.infoModeText: We show the general catalog while your plan access is recovered.
modulesCatalog.outsideText: Dubbing, sound post and restoration remain as labs or separate future products. They are not shown to the final client inside the CID Core modular catalog.
modulesCatalog.emptyText: When the commercial catalog is published, it will appear here for your organization.
modulesCatalog.activationText: For now we do not show final per-module pricing. Activation is handled by plan, pack or commercial approval depending on workflow type and each module's operational dependency.
modulesCatalog.planMissing: Not included in your current plan

storyboardBuilder.fullScriptAnalysisHelp: Analyze the full script to generate synopsis, characters, locations and sequence map. Then you can select a sequence to plan and generate its storyboard.
storyboardBuilder.noSequences: No sequences available. Analyze the full script to build the narrative map.
storyboardBuilder.noShotsText: Select a sequence and generate its storyboard.

characterBreakdown.empty: No characters were detected in the sequences.
characterBreakdown.title: Characters

sequenceSelectorModal.title: Select sequences for storyboard
sequenceSelectorModal.subtitle: Control exactly which sequences you want to generate without triggering the full storyboard by mistake.

modes.selectedDescription: Select multiple visible sequences and generate only that block.
modes.rangeDescription: Generate from an initial scene to a final scene.

sequenceSelectorModal.searchPlaceholder: Search by number, title, location, characters, INT/EXT or DAY/NIGHT...
sequenceSelectorModal.noVisibleSequences: No visible sequences match the current filter.
sequenceSelectorModal.fullWarning: This mode will generate the storyboard for all detected material. Use it only if you do not need partial selection.
sequenceSelectorModal.mustSelect: Select at least one sequence or scene to continue.

sheetExportPanel.title: Download Storyboard Sheet
sheetExportPanel.subtitle: Select format, template and pages to download the Storyboard Sheet as PNG or PDF. If you already generated the storyboard, settings are preconfigured.
sheetExportPanel.missingUrl: Export generated, but the download URL is not available. Try again or contact support.
sheetExportPanel.autoCurrentDescription: Uses current layout and preset without applying a commercial template.
sheetExportPanel.customValidation: The custom value must be an integer between 1 and 100.
sheetExportPanel.creditsWillCalculate: It will be calculated when generating the sheet.
sheetExportPanel.templateResolvesLayout: The selected template will automatically resolve the effective layout.
sheetExportPanel.templateResolvesPreset: The selected template will automatically resolve the effective preset.
sheetExportPanel.frameCostHelp: Select how many frames to include to control the estimated export cost.

errors.sessionExpired: Session expired. Please log in again.
errors.invalidRequest: The storyboard sheet request is invalid.
errors.validationError: The backend rejected the request due to a validation error.
errors.internalError: Could not generate the storyboard sheet due to an internal backend error.
errors.unavailable: The backend is currently unavailable. Please check your connection and try again.
errors.genericError: Could not generate the storyboard sheet.

current.label: Automatic / Current
current.description: Uses the current layout and preset without applying a commercial template.

clean_4_panel_pitch.label: Clean Pitch — 4 images
clean_4_panel_pitch.description: Compact pitch to present 4 key frames.

grid_8_panel_vertical.label: 8 images vertical
grid_8_panel_vertical.description: Vertical template of 8 panels for dense review.

production_12_panel_vertical.label: Production — 12 vertical
production_12_panel_vertical.description: Vertical production sheet for extensive sequences.

client_review_with_notes.label: Client with notes
client_review_with_notes.description: Template with more space for review and notes.

technical_storyboard_sheet.label: Technical
technical_storyboard_sheet.description: Technical format inspired by shot list sheets and notes.

directorFeedback.title: Director's Notes
directorFeedback.infoText: CID reviews the prompt respecting the original narrative logic: script, sequence, cinematographic intent, continuity, and visual reference if it exists.
directorFeedback.placeholder: Write your note here... E.g., 'The lighting is too dark, I need more natural light'
directorFeedback.noRevisions: There are no reviews for this shot yet.

characterBible.title: Character Bible
characterBible.subtitle: Visual continuity control for characters, approved references, and look variants.
characterBible.securityUiHelp: Enter an existing MediaAsset ID to link an approved reference. CID only stores the identifier and the secure API URL, never internal system paths.
characterBible.selectExistingAssetHelp: Select a visual asset already available in the project or use the manual MediaAsset ID field.
characterBible.noTraceabilityMetadata: No traceability metadata for this character.
characterBible.errorSelectCharacter: Select a character and enter a valid MediaAsset ID
characterBible.errorCompleteCharacter: Complete the character ID and name before saving
characterBible.errorCompleteLookVariant: Select a character and complete look_id and look_name
characterBible.errorSelectCharacterResolve: Select a character before resolving continuity
characterBible.errorSelectCharacterTrace: Select a character before checking traceability
characterBible.successAssetSelected: Asset selected. You can link it as an approved reference.
characterBible.noAssets: No visual assets are available in this project. You can still link references using a manual MediaAsset ID.

directorVisualReference.title: Director's Visual Reference
directorVisualReference.subtitle: Upload a reference image to guide the visual style of generations
directorVisualReference.notesPlaceholder: Example: "I want this scene to have soft light like the reference, but with warmer colors"
directorVisualReference.scriptMatchPlaceholder: Paste here the text of the script scene to compare it with the visual reference...

mood_only.label: Mood only
mood_only.description: Transfers only the environment and visual feeling

scriptIntelligence.title: Script Intelligence
scriptIntelligence.description: Analyzes scripts, structure, arcs, creative coverage and decision points for development and pre-production.

storyboardStudio.title: Storyboard Studio
storyboardStudio.description: Transforms script and visual decisions into storyboards, frames and assisted visual planning.

productionBreakdown.title: Production Breakdown
productionBreakdown.description: Extracts production elements, resources, needs and operational blocks to prepare shoots.

clientFeedbackMemory.title: Client Feedback Memory
clientFeedbackMemory.description: Learns from approved historical feedback to improve creative consistency and commercial response.

pitchDossier.title: Pitch & Dossier
pitchDossier.description: Generates presentation materials, dossiers and commercial narratives for financing, sales and partnerships.

comfyuiWorkflow.title: ComfyUI Workflow Intelligence
comfyuiWorkflow.description: Organizes and exploits complex visual workflows for teams working with generative pipelines.

dubbingLocalization.title: DubbingTake / Localization
dubbingLocalization.description: Centralizes dubbing, localization, adaptation and multilingual delivery control.

distributionAudience.title: Distribution & Audience
distributionAudience.description: Supports launch strategies, audience analysis and distribution material preparation.

editorialNleBridge.title: Editorial Intelligence & NLE Bridge
editorialNleBridge.description: Editorial intelligence system for ingestion, timecode transcription, character diarization, semantic search, selects, paper edit, markers, timelines and export/interaction with DaVinci Resolve, Avid Media Composer and Adobe Premiere Pro.
editorialNleBridge.independent: Sold as a standalone product for editorial and post-production teams.
editorialNleBridge.included: Also included inside CID Studio as a strategic high-value solution.
editorialNleBridge.nles: Commercially positioned around DaVinci Resolve, Avid Media Composer and Adobe Premiere Pro interoperability.
